name: pcs-categorization
description: Autonomous weekly product categorization for the Toolup multi-stores. Refreshes each store's full collection vocabulary (nav + off-nav floating collections), and on dual-tree stores (Shop-by-Category + Shop-by-Brand, e.g. MTS) tags products in BOTH trees. Reads each product's existing tags first (most New Item V2 items are already partially categorized), classifies New Item V2 non-kit products to their bottom-most collection(s), applies those tags, removes New Item V2 when complete, and adds CL-categorized. Product-tag writes are the ONLY writes; low-confidence items go to a Google Drive review queue (with local backup); a per-store lessons file grows over time. Bundles a strictly read-only Python engine (owner-approved exception to the markdown-only rule).
